summary: The diff implements all six requested requirements. REQ-1 (frequency polygon) is covered by the new frequencyPolygon.ts utility and its integration into ProgressView.tsx. REQ-2 (per-grade average percentage cards) is reflected in ProgressView.tsx changes. REQ-3 and REQ-4 (subject analysis with avg/high/low marks and percentages, plus grade/term filters) are covered by the new subjectAnalysis.ts library and SubjectAnalysisView.tsx updates. REQ-5 (9-scale grading) is covered by gradeCalculation.ts additions and NineScaleGradesView.tsx. REQ-6 (dynamic combined percentage) is covered by percent.ts additions and CombinedPercentageView.tsx updates. All implementations appear consistent with the acceptance criteria based on available evidence.
